alerts.desc: SQL injection may be possible. An attacker can execute arbitrary SQL queries against the database.
alerts.solution: Use parameterized queries or prepared statements.

alerts.desc: Arbitrary command execution is possible on the host system via unsanitized input passed to shell execution functions.
alerts.solution: Avoid executing commands directly on the shell. Sanitize inputs and validate parameters.

alerts.desc: The Anti-MIME-Sniffing header X-Content-Type-Options was not set to 'nosniff'.
alerts.solution: Configure your web server to send the X-Content-Type-Options header with a value of 'nosniff'.
